---
title: EASTER
---

```{python}
#| label: Front matter params
#| echo: false

frontmatter = """
mass:
  a:
    kyrie:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    gloria:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    holy-holy-holy:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    memorial-acclamation:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          option: 'A ("*When we eat...*")'
          year: "A"
          priority: required
    amen:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    lamb-of-god:
      list:
        - name: "Heritage Mass"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
  b:
    kyrie:
      list:
        - name: "Cantus Missae"
          book: GIA
          priority: required
    gloria:
      list:
        - name: "Congregational Mass"
          priority: required
    holy-holy-holy:
      list:
        - name: "A Community Mass"
          book: GIA
          priority: required
    memorial-acclamation:
      list:
        - name: "A Community Mass"
          book: GIA
          option: 'B ("*We proclaim...*")'
          year: "B"
          priority: required
    amen:
      list:
        - name: "A Community Mass"
          book: GIA
          priority: required
    lamb-of-god:
      list:
        - name: "A Community Mass"
          book: GIA
          priority: required
  c:
    kyrie:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    gloria:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    holy-holy-holy:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    memorial-acclamation:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          option: 'C ("*Save us...*")'
          year: "C"
          priority: required
    amen:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
    lamb-of-god:
      list:
        - name: "Mass of Christ the Savior"
          book: OCP
          priority: required
"""
```

```{python}
#| label: Setup and helper functions
#| echo: false
import sys
sys.path.append('../../')
import utils

# Front matter YAML and check for errors
params = utils.get_params(frontmatter)
```

::: {.red}
The Mass parts for all Masses during the Easter season are taken from the
appropriate Liturgical Cycle unless otherwise noted:
:::

::: {.titlered}
### &nbsp; Year A
:::
{{< var text.yeara >}}

```{python}
#| label: Year A
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
utils.masssetting(params['mass']['a'])
```

::: {.titlered}
### &nbsp; Year B
:::
{{< var text.yearb >}}

```{python}
#| label: Year B
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
utils.masssetting(params['mass']['b'])
```

::: {.red}
The Kyrie, Chant Mode III, when preceding the Congregational Mass Gloria in
B♭, should be played in the key of F.
:::

::: {.titlered}
### &nbsp; Year C
:::
{{< var text.yearc >}}

```{python}
#| label: Year C
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
utils.masssetting(params['mass']['c'])
```

::: {.centered}
{{< var symbols.cross >}} &nbsp; {{< var symbols.cross >}} &nbsp; {{< var symbols.cross >}}
:::
